name: markdown-magpie
description: Git-backed Markdown knowledge base maintenance with cited answers, gap detection, and pull request proposals.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @magpie/core && npm run build -w @magpie/markdown && npm run build -w @magpie/retrieval && npm run build -w @magpie/git && npm run build -w @magpie/jobs && npm run build -w @magpie/api && npm run build -w @magpie/watcher && npm run build -w @magpie/mcp && npm run build -w @magpie/web
